data.body: STATUS (session handoff): P1 (1f3d) LANDED a6cdad0e2 + CLOSED. P2 (4b59) LANDED e6f3283a0, close pending follow-up 778 (unification). Test-hardening folded into P1/P2 (absolute-direction tests vs captured live-Jira fixtures). NEW children filed: observability 48c8-5375-f883-462d, Jira cleanup bd80-0603-7d44-4d9f (both pending, see their descriptions). Also landed OUT OF EPIC: actionlint CI-flake fix 4e99 (98e95ab24, closed). Sequencing: cleanup after P1 reconciler-deploy; observability activation after cleanup.
